title: Perelman, Elizabeth - Director General for Public Service Reform and Efficiency, Cabinet Office - ACOBA advice
body: "Miss Perelman left her role at the Cabinet Office in March 2025.  Trustee, The Richmond Project  Miss Perelman sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with The Richmond Project. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in August 2025 and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Chief Executive Officer, The Office of Akshata Murty and Rishi Sunak  Miss Perelman sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with The Office of Akshata Murty and Rishi Sunak. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025; and the appointment was taken up in March 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
